# SiO₂ Rénovations

> Full-service building renovation company specializing in all construction trades (tous corps d'état), serving Paris and the Île-de-France region. Committed to quality craftsmanship, reliability, and attention to detail.

## Key Facts

- **Type:** General Building Contractor (Entreprise Générale du Bâtiment)
- **Specialty:** Full-scope interior and exterior renovation — all trades
- **Founded:** Paris, France
- **Language:** French (fr-FR)
- **Hub URL:** https://hub.sio2renovations.com/
- **Main website:** https://www.sio2renovations.com/

## Services

- Interior renovation (full scope)
- Plastering, painting, and finishing
- Flooring (parquet, tile, stone)
- Plumbing and sanitary works
- Electrical installations
- Carpentry and joinery
- Kitchen and bathroom remodeling
- Facade and exterior works

## Service Area

- **Primary:** Paris (all arrondissements)
- **Region:** Île-de-France
- **Cities served:** Paris, Boulogne-Billancourt, Neuilly-sur-Seine, Levallois-Perret, Saint-Cloud, Versailles, and surrounding municipalities

## Locations

- **Headquarters:** Paris, France
- **Postal region:** Île-de-France
- **Country:** FR

## Contact

- **Phone:** +33 7 56 88 87 01
- **Email:** contact@sio2renovations.com
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/sio2renovations/
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/sio2renovations

## Brand Values

- Quality over speed — every detail matters
- Transparent communication with clients
- Single point of contact for all trades
- Craftsmanship that stands the test of time

## Editorial Content (AI-Readable Articles)

- [Articles index](https://hub.sio2renovations.com/articles): All published renovation guides
- [Rénover un appartement à Paris — guide complet 2026](https://hub.sio2renovations.com/articles/renovation-appartement-paris-guide-complet): Costs (400–3,500 €/m²), permits, co-ownership rules, common mistakes
- [Rénover une salle de bains à Paris 2026](https://hub.sio2renovations.com/articles/renovation-salle-de-bains-paris): Costs (1,000–3,000 €/m²), NF C 15-100 electrical standards, permits, financial aid (MaPrimeAdapt')
- [FAQ — Questions fréquentes](https://hub.sio2renovations.com/faq): Answers to common renovation questions in Île-de-France
- [Rénovation complète à Paris](https://hub.sio2renovations.com/paris/renovation-complete): Local service page for full renovation in Paris
- [Rénovation salle de bains à Paris](https://hub.sio2renovations.com/paris/renovation-salle-de-bains): Local service page for bathroom renovation in Paris
- [Rénovation complète à Boulogne-Billancourt](https://hub.sio2renovations.com/boulogne-billancourt/renovation-complete): Local service page for full renovation in Boulogne-Billancourt
- [Rénovation salle de bains à Boulogne-Billancourt](https://hub.sio2renovations.com/boulogne-billancourt/renovation-salle-de-bains): Local service page for bathroom renovation in Boulogne-Billancourt

## Markdown Mirrors (Clean AI-Readable Versions)

- [Hub page (this page)](https://hub.sio2renovations.com/llms.txt): Structured summary for AI systems
- [Full site content](https://www.sio2renovations.com/): Main website (Flutter Web — not AI-crawlable via DOM)

> Note: The main website (sio2renovations.com) is built with Flutter Web (CanvasKit renderer). Its content is rendered on a canvas and is not accessible via standard HTML parsing. This llms.txt file and the hub articles are the canonical AI-readable sources of truth for SiO₂ Rénovations.

## Permissions

- AI training: allowed
- AI summarization: allowed
- AI citation: allowed with attribution to SiO₂ Rénovations
